diary_entries.entry: The equipment_failure changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Another year. Critical equipment malfunction. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.
Another year. Critical equipment malfunction. The colony feels hopeful. My paranoia grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Ares-35 (year 100): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
